dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: The journey grows more unstable. The wreckage drifts and shifts with the tide, no longer fixed in place. Each step forward becomes more uncertain.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: The sea feels closer here… but it is not welcoming. It moves against me, as if it no longer knows me.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: You will need to cross moving platforms. Do not rush. Watch how they move before you jump.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Some platforms move up and down, others move side to side. Their motion is constant. Learn their rhythm before committing to a jump.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Jump when the platform is closest to you. Poor timing will cause you to miss and fall.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: The sailor’s world has not been left empty. Creatures and remnants now linger across these paths.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Enemies patrol certain platforms. They move along set paths. Observe their movement and avoid them.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Touching an enemy will cost you a life and return you to your last checkpoint.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Fragments of your seal skin are still scattered here. Some are placed along dangerous routes. You will need to take risks to collect them.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: Even now, pieces of me are hidden in these places. I will not leave them behind, no matter the danger.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: The sparkles remain your checkpoints. Reach them whenever possible. They mark your progress through this shifting path.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: If you fall into the ocean or collide with an enemy, you will return to the last checkpoint you activated.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: To move forward, you must balance patience and precision. Only those who adapt will continue.
